examples: This product has been phenomenally successful.
Annie, 37, has recently re-launched her phenomenally successful singing career.
The result is far from pretty but the method is surprisingly safe and phenomenally fast.
And Mr Djukanovic is a phenomenally clever politician, with an unerring instinct for survival.
Still, these are external choices, and Mr. Day-Lewis works famously, and phenomenally, from the inside out.
